text.title: Win-Loss Quarterly PM Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Win-Loss Quarterly PM Template output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: quarter populated with a typed value
crm_data populated with a typed value
interview_themes populated with a typed value
competitive_notes populated with a typed value
top_themes_synthesized populated with a typed value
decisions populated with a typed value
distribution_audience populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
